---
title: "Data model"
---

The directory is a series of flat JSON files, which may be transformed and rendered with a static site generator or other extended data visualization pipeline.

Three files anchor the dataset: people, publications, and initiatives.

## people.json

One object per person.

| Field                | Type             | Notes                                         |
|:---------------------|:-----------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| `id`                 | string           | lastname-firstname                            |
| `display_name`       | string           | full name                                     |
| `orcid`              | string           | ORCID iD, if known                            |
| `affiliations`       | array of objects | see OrganizationRole table below              |
| `categories`         | array of strings | disciplinary or professional categories       |
| `tags`               | array of strings | free-text tags                                |
| `identifiers`        | array of objects | see identifiers table below                   |

### affiliations

Array of objects, following the shape of schema.org's `OrganizationRole`.

| Field                | Type             | Notes                                         |
|:---------------------|:-----------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| `institution`        | string           | institution name                              |
| `ror`                | string           | ROR ID, full https://ror.org/... form         |
| `roleName`           | string           | e.g. Postdoctoral Researcher                  |
| `startDate`          | string           | year                                          |
| `endDate`            | string           | year, omitted if current                      |

### identifiers

Array of objects, following ORCID's `external-id` construct.

| Field                | Type             | Notes                                         |
|:---------------------|:-----------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| `type`               | string           | e.g. openalex, personal website, Mastodon     |
| `value`              | string           | the identifier or handle itself               |
| `url`                | string           | resolvable link                               |

### Example

```json
{
  "id": "batist-zack",
  "display_name": "Zack Batist",
  "orcid": "0000-0003-0435-508X",
  "affiliations": [
    {
      "institution": "McGill University",
      "ror": "https://ror.org/01pxwe438",
      "roleName": "Postdoctoral Researcher",
      "startDate": "2024"
    },
    {
      "institution": "University of Toronto",
      "ror": "https://ror.org/03dbr7087",
      "roleName": "PhD Candidate",
      "startDate": "2017",
      "endDate": "2023"
    }
  ],
  "categories": ["scholarly communication", "STS"],
  "tags": ["open-science", "data-sharing", "archaeology"],
  "identifiers": [
    {
      "type": "openalex",
      "value": "A5023888391",
      "url": "https://openalex.org/A5023888391"
    },
    {
      "type": "personal website",
      "value": "https://zackbatist.info",
      "url": "https://zackbatist.info"
    },
    {
      "type": "Mastodon",
      "value": "@zackbatist@archaeo.social",
      "url": "https://archaeo.social/@zackbatist"
    }
  ]
}
```

## publications.json

One object per publication, following BibLaTeX field names.

| Field                | Type             | Notes                                         |
|:---------------------|:-----------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| `citekey`            | string           | lowercase last name plus year                 |
| `entrytype`          | string           | BibLaTeX entry type                           |
| `author`             | array of strings | each as Lastname, Firstname                   |
| `title`              | string           | —                                              |
| `journaltitle`       | string           | —                                              |
| `date`               | string           | —                                              |
| `volume`             | string           | —                                              |
| `number`             | string           | —                                              |
| `pages`              | string           | —                                              |
| `doi`                | string           | —                                              |
| `keywords`           | string           | standard BibLaTeX field                       |

### Example

```json
{
  "citekey": "batist2021",
  "entrytype": "article",
  "author": [
    "Batist, Zachary",
    "Masters, Val",
    "Torma, Tiffany C.",
    "Carter, Michael",
    "Ferris, Neal",
    "Huvila, Isto",
    "Ross, Seamus",
    "Dallas, Costis"
  ],
  "title": "Figurations of Digital Practice, Craft, and Agency in Two Mediterranean Fieldwork Projects",
  "journaltitle": "Open Archaeology",
  "date": "2021",
  "volume": "7",
  "number": "1",
  "pages": "1731--1755",
  "doi": "10.1515/opar-2020-0217",
  "keywords": "digital practice, fieldwork, craft, agency"
}
```

Each entry in `author` links to `people.json` through the pipeline's disambiguation step, not through an embedded ID. An `initiatives` field, relating a publication to initiatives, is planned but not yet implemented.

## initiatives.json

One object per initiative.

| Field                | Type             | Notes                                         |
|:---------------------|:-----------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| `id`                 | string           | —                                              |
| `name`               | string           | —                                              |
| `url`                | string           | —                                              |
| `institutional_host` | string or null   | ROR ID, or null if no single host             |

### Example

```json
{
  "id": "open-archaeo",
  "name": "open-archaeo",
  "url": "https://o-a.rocks",
  "institutional_host": null
}
```

A membership roster, relating an initiative to its contributors, is planned but not yet implemented.

## Linked resources

- [schema.org: OrganizationRole](https://schema.org/OrganizationRole)
- [ROR: Research Organization Registry](https://ror.org/)
- [ROR identifier documentation](https://ror.readme.io/docs/identifier)
- [OpenAlex: Institutions](https://docs.openalex.org/api-entities/institutions)
- [OpenAlex: single entity lookup](https://docs.openalex.org/how-to-use-the-api/get-single-entities)
- [Crossref: affiliations and ROR](https://www.crossref.org/documentation/schema-library/markup-guide-metadata-segments/affiliations/)
- [ORCID record schema](https://info.orcid.org/documentation/integration-guide/orcid-record/)
- [BibLaTeX package documentation](https://ctan.org/pkg/biblatex)
- [BibTeX field reference](https://bibtex.eu/fields/)
